title: Maxi's All Ride Mons! Mount all Cobblemon!
description: This data pack adds the possibility to ride all current Pokémon found in Cobblemon, for you to enjoy your journey across sky, sea and land.
body:
Everyone is (rideable) here!

This data pack adds the possibility to ride all current Pokémon found in the Cobblemon Mod for you to enjoy your journey across sky, sea and land. Supports up-to-date 941 base Cobblemon Pokémon!
  • Up to date Cobblemon!

  1. Download the CM-1.7.3_AllRideMons.zip.
  2. Put it inside the datapacks folder of your Minecraft World & resourcepacks of your Minecraft installation.
  3. Select the CM-1.7.3_AllRideMons resourse pack from the available packs ingame.
  4. Restart/Run the server for the datapack to load.
  5. Done! Now you should be able to ride all Pokémon!

  • I can't ride any Pokémon
    The data pack needs the lastest Cobblemon version for it to work, make sure you have this data pack installed both on your client and server.

  • I'm piercing my Pokémon
    The position your avatar is when riding is somewhat tricky to set since it's per Pokémon, in future updates it may have the correct position while riding.

  • My Pokémon moves but I'm stuck in place
    You need to Select the resource pack to make the ride settings work!

Check out my other projects!
